summary: Freeform text summary of the problems with the inefficiencies or failure modes in the trace: WebSurfer unnecessarily repeated the same failed archive-search report twice (step repetition), while verification was weak/noisy because one agent claimed it could not access the needed snapshots even though another later retrieved and compared them; despite this inefficiency, the system ultimately answered correctly with “shrimp.”

A.
